result.stdout:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
Sfumato: The Ultra-Fast CSS Generation Tool 
Version 6.1.7 for Linux (X64) 
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
Sfumato copies one or more specified source CSS files to new output files that 
have additional styles for all utility class references in project files. You 
then use the output files instead of the source CSS files. Sfumato can build 
once or watch project files for changes and regenerate the CSS as needed. 
 
Additionally, Sfumato can build/watch multiple source CSS files at once! 
 
Add Sfumato project settings to your source CSS files by adding a `@layer 
sfumato { :root { } }` block to the top, but below any @import statements. Run 
the `init` command (below) to create an example CSS file in the current path. 
 
USAGE: 
⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻ 
sfumato [command] [options] 
 
COMMANDS: 
⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻ 
help     : Show this help message 
init     : Create sfumato-example.css file in the current path 
version  : Show the Sfumato version number 
build    : Perform a build of the specified file(s) 
watch    : Perform a build of the specified file(s) and watch for changes 
 
OPTIONS: 
⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻ 
[file]   : Path to a CSS file that has Sfumato project settings 
--minify : Minify CSS output; overrides project setting 
 
Options must be specified as [file] [--minify] and repeat in pairs. 
 
EXAMPLE: 
⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻ 
sfumato watch client/css/source.css --minify server/css/source.css --minify 
 
COMPATIBILITY: 
⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻⎻ 
If you need to continue to use the prior version of Sfumato, install 
sfumato-scss tool. This should be used for older projects relying on that 
version. 
 
Install the compatibility tool with the command below:  
 
dotnet tool install --global fynydd.sfumato-scss
